text: Hi sweetheart. I found my old broad-edge nibs in the hall closet. Want me to mail them to you?
Grandma, yes please! I'd love to learn on yours. I'll send you a card I lettered this week so you can tell me what to fix.
I will, and I expect to be impressed. Your spacing has gotten so good. Love you.
The Harbor Candle product shots are edited. Sending the gallery link tonight. The label lettering photographs so well.
Thank you, Jas. Priya is going to be thrilled. Want to grab a pour-over at Anthology this week and plan the spring shoot?
Always yes to Anthology. Tuesday morning?
Are we still on for the Rouge River walk Saturday? I need to move before spring busy season eats us both.
Yes. Trailhead at nine, coffee after. I'll bring the good thermos.
Perfect. See you Saturday.
Hi Amara, lovely to connect. Here is the proposal for your wedding suite: invitation, menu, and a custom monogram. Happy to work around the time difference for calls.
Thank you Laura. The monogram samples are exactly the feeling we want. Evenings your time suit us well.
Wonderful. I'll send a calendar link and a short questionnaire so we start from your story.
Bonjour Sophie, the revised place cards are ready. I warmed the ink color slightly to match your linen. Files attached when you are ready.
They are perfect, merci. We will print locally in Lyon. You made this so easy from afar.
Hey cousin, my UM-Dearborn design club wants a lettering workshop. Any chance you'd come talk to us next term?
I'd love to, Rami. Send me the dates and I'll bring brush pens for everyone.
You're the best. I'll pin down a room and let you know.
Brand identity package delivered to the retainer client this week.
Hand-lettering a bridal signage commission — brush pens and gouache.
Wednesday 9 PM call with Grandma Florence, the standing line.
Quarterly lettering workshop at the Arts Center, twelve seats full.
Portfolio relaunch on Webflow this October with the new case studies.
Etsy order shipped — a letterpress print and a watercolor original.
Saturday brunch with Amy, ten years of standing plans.
Styled shoot with Jasmine, traded lettering for the photos.
Sunday lunch with Mom, the standing family event.
Lifted the commission floor to $55 after the talk with Lena.
Yoga With Adriene at 6:30, the slower practice before the desk.
Rouge River trail walk this afternoon, one to two miles.
Lo-fi and bossa nova for studio hours, the daily soundtrack.
Wrist brace on for the long lettering session; stretches after.
Client contract and invoice out through HoneyBook.
Al-Ameer for Lebanese, Avalon breads for the cortado.
Private Greenhouse view of in-house design roles; only Lena knows.
QuickBooks Self-Employed reconciled, quarterly estimate on the 15th.
Anthology pour-over at the desk, amber bulb on.
Bike ride with Rami if the weather holds this weekend.
The Pinterest lettering board no one has seen, growing slowly.
Case study written up; the kerning pair finally sits right.
Household contribution to Mom and Dad on the 1st.
Reading Celeste Ng on the iPad before bed.
